data.title: AACR 2026 | Abbisko Therapeutics Showcases Six Research Advances Highlighting pan-KRAS, 4th Generation EGFR, and Synthetic Lethality Approaches
data.description: On April 22, 2026, Abbisko Therapeutics (HKEX: 02256) revealed that they showcased six new preclinical and translational research discoveries during poster sessions at the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting between April 17 and 22.

data.title: Beach Football League Brings Santa Cruz Beach Classic to Iconic Boardwalk May 16-17
data.description: Two NFL stars, Marshawn Lynch and DeShaun Foster, headline a two-day event in Santa Cruz, California, on April 22, 2026, showcasing NFL talent, a kids camp, live music, and beachside culture. The event is organized by the Beach Football League (BFL), known for being the world's inaugural professional tackle football league on sand.

data.title: Kioxia Introduces New Mainstream KIOXIA BG8 Series SSDs for PC OEMs
data.description: Kioxia Corporation unveiled the KIOXIA BG8 Series client SSD for PC OEM clients in Tokyo. The new product brings PCIe 5.0 speed to the mainstream market, catering specifically to PC manufacturers.

data.title: Registration for the 2026 National Summit in San Diego, CA is Officially Open!
data.description: Sandler Partners, a reputable technology distributor, has initiated registration for their upcoming 3-day National Summit aimed at empowering Partners to expand their businesses. Scheduled to take place in REDONDO BEACH, Calif., starting from April 22, 2026, the event will offer valuable insights and resources to aid Partners in their growth. Interested participants can now secure their spots...

data.title: HashKey Group Announces Strategic Partnership with ANAP Holdings to Expand Bitcoin Treasury and Institutional Asset Management in Japan
data.description: HashKey Group, a subsidiary of HashKey Holdings Limited (3887.HK), revealed today in Tokyo that it has secured a tentative agreement to form a strategic alliance with ANAP Holdings Inc. (TSE: 3189), a prominent Tokyo-listed firm in Japan.
